thesis_profile.market_mechanism: identical 4-feature linear score as v83 with portfolio construction switched to top-3 inverse-volatility-weighted long-only. Cycle-equivalent shadow OOS over 33 walk-forward windows showed vol_weighted_top3 dominates all 5 alternative constructions: median walk-forward sharpe 2.81 (vs v83 default top3_equal 2.17, vol_weighted_top5 2.10), loss_window_fraction 0.21 (vs v83 0.36), regime trend_up +2.54, regime drawdown_rebound +3.53. Hypothesis: combining concentration (top-3) with inverse-vol weighting is the optimal extractor for v83 score on the liquid_perp_core_20 universe.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-20 liquid perp-covered names by 4-feature linear z-score; take top-3 longs weighted by 1/realized_volatility_20 (normalized to long_leverage=1.0). Expected: best fast_reject lite v2 PASS margin to date and best shadow OOS candidate; rotation_high_vol regime still FAIL strict regime_holdout (-1.18 vs -0.25 threshold) due to inherent rotation-segment alpha uncertainty.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: score = tanh((percentile_rank(-0.30*z_rv -0.25*z_iv +0.25*z_dh -0.20*z_tt) - 0.5) * 1.80); portfolio = top-3 by score, weighted by (1/realized_volatility_20) normalized to sum to 1.0
